ratings.comment: Very good and kind teacher! Although the discussion questions were sometimes hard, we can still do them if we analyze them in deep!

Sarah was the best professor I had during my spring semester! Super helpful and clear with instructions and any questions you have. She's responsive and well-spoken in regards to applying our knowledge into our world now and all her content. Readings were a bit confusing at times but she made sure we understood when we asked questions!

Sarah is one of the best professors I have ever had! She is so kind and made every class so interesting- she has such a wise perspective on the world. If you are considering taking a class with her, DO IT!!!!!
